title: Andhra University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Andhra University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Andhra University Result 2026 has officially been released for B.Arch 1st Semester and various PG courses including M.Pharmacy 3rd Semester and M.Sc 1st Semester exams conducted in February and March 2026. Students can now check their results online through the official Andhra University result portal at andhrauniversity.edu.in.

content.text: Andhra University Result 2026 has been officially released for B.Arch 1st Semester and multiple PG courses including M.Pharmacy 3rd Semester and M.Sc 1st Semester examinations conducted in February and March 2026. Students who appeared for these UG and PG exams can now check their results online.

Andhra University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://andhrauniversity.edu.in/. The university has published results for B.Arch, M.Pharmacy, and M.Sc courses such as Environmental Sciences, Geography, and Human Genetics. Students can access their results by entering their hall ticket number or login credentials on the result portal.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their result, including name, hall ticket number, and marks obtained. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact the university authorities for correction.

Andhra University has released the latest UG and PG semester results for the 2026 academic session. Students can now check B.Arch, M.Pharmacy, and M.Sc semester results online through the official website using their login credentials. The results include both regular and supplementary examinations.

Andhra University has activated the direct links to check B.Arch, M.Pharmacy, and M.Sc semester results for the 2026 session. Students can easily view and download their results through the official portal using the links provided below.

links.label: B.Arch 1st Semester Regular and Supplementary March 2026
M.Pharmacy 3rd Semester Regular and Supplementary February 2026

sections.heading: How to Check Andhra University Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download Andhra University Result 2026:

items: Visit the official result portal - https://results.andhrauniversity.edu.in/
Click on the relevant course and semester result link.
Enter your hall ticket number or required login details.
Your result will appear on the screen.
Download and take a printout for future reference.

structured_links.label: B.Arch 1st Semester Regular and Supplementary March 2026
M.Pharmacy 3rd Semester Regular and Supplementary February 2026
